'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=H5Qv.bS2v0_RJMtkboyn9A3urg6w.9c.LQS705nGFEE-1774273995-1.0.1.1-5a7XYcLM61n4pphseB.gYAMfOTH2bzON3xCyg7I1OCY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
